job_description: PeopleData Systems is hiring a Associate Data Scientist in Pune. The role works with product, data and client teams to solve future of work and labor market analytics problems. Responsibilities include cleaning large datasets, building analytical datasets, developing models, communicating recommendations, and creating dashboards. Required skills include Data Visualization, LLM, Machine Learning, Model Evaluation, Python, SQL, Scikit-learn, Statistics, Tableau and Vector Database. Experience with stakeholder communication, statistical thinking, and business technology tools is preferred.
